acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The shell checker rejects absolute and traversal endpoint and artifact references.
The shell checker rejects unknown product QUIC artifact kinds.
Negative self-tests cover the required invalid references and unknown kind cases.
Rust validation rejects invalid endpoint evidence directories and artifact paths while preserving the typed artifact-kind vocabulary.
The runbook documents repo-relative, traversal-free, known-kind references for product QUIC evidence.
No live product QUIC, Mac decode/render, latency, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Artifact-schema hardening only; no live product QUIC or cross-device validation is required or claimed for this node.
